INSERT INTO produkte(datum, org_ID, namePrd, artikelNrPrd, custom1, custom2, custom3, custom4, custom5, custom6, anl01_ID, anl02_ID, anl03_ID, anl04_ID, anl05_ID, anl06_ID, anl07_ID, anl08_ID, anl09_ID, gruppenID, deleted, archiviert) VALUES (getdate(), '1', 'Test 03', 'Test 03', '1 compartment', '500', '', '', '', '', '38', '48', '125', '', '', '', '', '', '', '','false','false')
